name: Sorghum Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions: Cream sugar and butter. Beat in sorghum and egg. Stir together flour, baking soda, spices, and salt. Add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk; beat after each addition. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets. Top each with one or two raisins. Bake at 350°F for 7 to 10 minutes.
